records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your CRF should be nearly depleted by now, and yet you're still holding on...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your CRF should be nearly depleted by now, and yet you're still holding on...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your CRF should be nearly depleted by now, and yet you're still holding on...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can hardly believe the difference between us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can hardly believe the difference between us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can hardly believe the difference between us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Difference? You're just a freak of nature...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Difference? You're just a freak of nature...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Difference? You're just a freak of nature...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: My wounds aren't healing as fast.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My wounds aren't healing as fast.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My wounds aren't healing as fast.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But why? CRF and regeneration shouldn't be related...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But why? CRF and regeneration shouldn't be related...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But why? CRF and regeneration shouldn't be related...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see you're wondering why your wounds won't heal.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see you're wondering why your wounds won't heal.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see you're wondering why your wounds won't heal.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's thanks to my custom bullets, refined with silver and mixed with Eternium.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's thanks to my custom bullets, refined with silver and mixed with Eternium.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's thanks to my custom bullets, refined with silver and mixed with Eternium.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As expected, your wounds aren't regenerating properly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As expected, your wounds aren't regenerating properly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As expected, your wounds aren't regenerating properly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So far, everything matches the Northern Union's research records.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So far, everything matches the Northern Union's research records.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So far, everything matches the Northern Union's research records.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... Hehehe...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... Hehehe...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... Hehehe...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still acting calm in a situation like this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still acting calm in a situation like this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still acting calm in a situation like this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why is that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why is that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why is that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you still have some secret weapon up your sleeve?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you still have some secret weapon up your sleeve?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you still have some secret weapon up your sleeve?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Weapon...? I wish...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Weapon...? I wish...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Weapon...? I wish...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't heal... I can't unleash my power...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't heal... I can't unleash my power...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't heal... I can't unleash my power...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And yet... this is all just hilarious.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And yet... this is all just hilarious.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And yet... this is all just hilarious.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You did all this just so you could live.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You did all this just so you could live.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You did all this just so you could live.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You devoured your own family, your own servants... and for what? To stay alive?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You devoured your own family, your own servants... and for what? To stay alive?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You devoured your own family, your own servants... and for what? To stay alive?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I... I'd never do that... Damn it...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I... I'd never do that... Damn it...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I... I'd never do that... Damn it...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you've been through that same hell as I have...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you've been through that same hell as I have...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you've been through that same hell as I have...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then you would know...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then you would know...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then you would know...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: An unidentified weather anomaly has occurred.
records.m_Talk_DEU: An unidentified weather anomaly has occurred.
records.m_Talk_FRA: An unidentified weather anomaly has occurred.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All citizens, please <color=#ff3636>open</color> your windows and <color=#ff3636>look</color> at the moon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All citizens, please <color=#ff3636>open</color> your windows and <color=#ff3636>look</color> at the moon.
